pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.431) to justify inclusion for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world Data and AI Strategy Consultant roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Regulatory Compliance is not a standard competency expectation for Data and AI Strategy Consultant. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Data and AI Strategy Consultant competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.431) and edge-domain placement (Regulatory Compliance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant. All passes support exclusion.
